refine_constraint: Your answer must be derived by calling between 6 to 10 tool calls across all interaction turns to ensure comprehensive resolution of both city/toolchain identification and value comparison. The city_feature_identifier and city_reputation_identifier tools must be invoked in a single action step. The agent may invoke each of the following tools (city_feature_identifier, city_reputation_identifier, artist_location_finder, artwork_valuation_tool, company_locator, financial_data_retriever) at most 2 times during the solution process.
